    emit_files_under = external/
  }
  dict: {
    aa = missing
    ab = persistence
    ac = Print
    ad = process
    ae = results
    af = string
    ag = strings
    ah = value
    ai = values
    b = external
    c = kv
    d = ts
    e = CLI
    f = store
    g = delete
    h = errors
    i = get
    j = JSON
    k = list
    l = module
    m = set
    n = types
    o = TypeScript
    p = npx
    q = tsx
    r = index
    s = keys
    t = Node
    u = user
    v = arguments
    w = argv
    x = beyond
    y = data
    z = key
  }
  body: {
    context: {
      o t project for a file-backed z ah f e
      The f persists records to a j file on disk
      The e reads v and mutates or queries the f
    }
    variables: {
      dir = b/c
      entry = b/c/e.d
      typesFile = b/c/n.d
      storeFile = b/c/f.d
      errorsFile = b/c/h.d
      indexFile = b/c/r.d
      dataFile = b/c/y.j
      commands = i m g k
    }
    goal: {
      Create a o z ah f with file ab and a e
      Implement i m g k against a j f file
      n live in n file and cover KvRecord StoreData CliCommand
      f l loads and saves the j f file, creates it when aa
      f l exposes i m g k using af s and af ai
      h l defines StoreError for aa s and invalid v
      e l parses ad w and runs the matching command then prints ae
      r l re-exports public API from f n and h
      e usage examples:
      p q b/c/e.d m u:1 alice
      p q b/c/e.d i u:1
      p q b/c/e.d g u:1
      p q b/c/e.d k
    }
    constraints: {
      Target o only
      No npm dependencies x t built-ins
      Use t fs and path only for ab
      Use ad.w for e parsing
      Keep modules small and explicit
      Do not invent extra features x i m g k
      ai are ag only
      s are non-empty ag
      ac plain text ae to stdout
      On h ac a short message to stderr and exit with code 1
    }
    output: {
      Write only these o files under b/c
      b/c/n.d
      b/c/h.d
      b/c/f.d
      b/c/e.d
      b/c/r.d
      Do not write y.j yourself
      No explanations
      No markdown
      No preamble
      No postamble
      No comments unless required for o
    }
